tasks.label: Start Local Static Server
tasks.command: $ErrorActionPreference = 'SilentlyContinue'; Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq 'node.exe' -and $_.CommandLine -match 'debug-server.js' } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force }; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5500 -State Listen | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force }; node debug-server.js

tasks.label: Stop Local Static Server
tasks.command: $ErrorActionPreference = 'SilentlyContinue'; Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq 'node.exe' -and $_.CommandLine -match 'debug-server.js' } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force }; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5500 -State Listen | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force }

tasks.label: Start Multiplayer Backend
tasks.command: $ErrorActionPreference = 'SilentlyContinue'; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -State Listen | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force }; npm run server:start

tasks.label: Stop Multiplayer Backend
tasks.command: $ErrorActionPreference = 'SilentlyContinue'; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -State Listen | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force }

tasks.label: Start Multiplayer + Static
tasks.detail: Default: starts static host (5500) and multiplayer backend (3001).

tasks.label: Restart Multiplayer + Static
tasks.detail: Stops and restarts both local services.
